zh.Bradwell, West Down, Devon, England: 英國戴文韋斯特 唐
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph De Pyne於1207年出生在英國戴文韋斯特 唐時，他的父親Hugh De Pyne24歲，母親Juliana of Bradwell20歲。他於大約1230年與Mrs- Ralph De Pyn在英國英格蘭戴文韋斯特 唐結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1235年在英國英格蘭戴文韋斯特 唐享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph De Pyne于1207年出生在英国戴文韋斯特 唐时，他的父亲Hugh De Pyne24岁，母亲Juliana of Bradwell20岁。他于大约1230年与Mrs- Ralph De Pyn在英国英格兰戴文韋斯特 唐结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1235年在英国英格兰戴文韋斯特 唐享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Pine  . This name has been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Pine
meanings: English: from Middle English pin(e) (Old English pīn, Old French pin), a topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous pine tree or in a pine forest; in some cases it may originally have been a nickname for a tall man, one thought to resemble a pine tree.
English: nickname from Middle English pine ‘pain, injury, torture, punishment, infirmity’, referring to someone who suffered from an inflicted pain or punishment.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Pin in Calvados or some other French place called from a prominent pine.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph De Pyne was born in 1207, in West Down, Devon, England, his father, Hugh De Pyne, was 24 and his mother, Juliana of Bradwell, was 20. He married Mrs- Ralph De Pyn about 1230, in West Down, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1235, in West Down, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph De Pyne est né en 1207, à West Down, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Hugh De Pyne, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Juliana of Bradwell, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Mrs- Ralph De Pyn environ 1230, à West Down, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1235, à West Down, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph De Pyneが1207年にイギリスデボンウエスト ダウンで生まれた時，父Hugh De Pyneは24歳，母Juliana of Bradwellは20歳であった。約1230年にイギリスイギリスデボンウエスト ダウンでMrs- Ralph De Pynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1235年にイギリスイギリスデボンウエスト ダウンで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph De Pyne(이)가 1207년 영국 데폰 웨스트 다운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh De Pyne(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana of Bradwell(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 웨스트 다운에서 Mrs- Ralph De Pyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 웨스트 다운에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Mrs- Ralph De Pyn aproximadamente 1230, em West Down, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph De Pyne родился в 1207 г. в местности вест доун, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh De Pyne было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana of Bradwell, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs- Ralph De Pyn около 1230 г. в местности вест доун, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1235 г. в местности вест доун, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет.
